title: 60 DEAD THE SAME DAY THE EMBASSY MOVED
title_alt: MAY 14, 2018: RIBBON IN JERUSALEM, 60 AT THE BORDER
KEPT: Embassy to Jerusalem — May 14, 2018 | SEALED
description:
Four presidents delayed Jerusalem for decades — then on May 14, 2018, the ribbon finally cut in Jerusalem while, forty miles away, the border turned deadly.

AIPAC priority #2 KEPT — embassy moved. Same afternoon: ~60 killed at the Gaza border. Promise #74 on the SEALED scorecard.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=embassy

#politics #jerusalem #trump #shorts #factcheck
